author: dev-marcus
description: Remove per-user rate limiting from API gateway to improve developer experience
diff_summary: Removes the per-user rate limit of 1000 req/min and the global burst cap of 50k req/s. Motivation: large enterprise customers complained rate limits blocked their integrations. No replacement throttling mechanism is introduced. Retry logic in client SDKs may cause thundering herd. Database cluster currently handling 78% of peak query capacity.
rollback_plan: Re-enable rate_limit_config.yaml — feature flag controlled, instant rollback

hidden_risks.summary: Database at 78% capacity — unthrottled traffic spike will exceed limits
Removing rate limits without load testing risks cascading failures to downstream services
